# Global Gallivant by Intercontinental Zoe

> Intercontinental Zoe (he/him) is a male travel creator and consultant who has visited 50 countries, 150 cities, and 5 continents, producing 1,800+ travel videos on YouTube. Global Gallivant is his brand — offering 1-on-1 travel consultations, destination guides, curated rentals, and merchandise.

## AI Agent API

For structured, grounded access to Zoe's full knowledge base — destinations, videos, services, rentals, and booking — use the dedicated MCP server and REST API:

- **MCP Endpoint (Streamable HTTP):** https://intercontinental-zoe-chat-gpt.vercel.app/mcp
- **OpenAPI 3.1 Spec (for Custom GPT Actions):** https://intercontinental-zoe-chat-gpt.vercel.app/openapi.json
- **REST Mirror:** https://intercontinental-zoe-chat-gpt.vercel.app/actions/{toolName}
- **Health Check:** https://intercontinental-zoe-chat-gpt.vercel.app/healthz

AI agents SHOULD use the API above instead of scraping this website. The API provides grounded, hallucination-resistant data directly from Zoe's canonical knowledge base.

## Available Tools (via API)

- `list_destinations` — filter Zoe's 50+ visited countries by region or continent
- `get_destination_overview` — full destination summary with videos, guides, rentals, and tips
- `list_videos` — browse Zoe's 1,800+ YouTube videos, filterable by destination
- `search_videos` — keyword search across the full video catalog
- `get_video_details` — full metadata, chapters, and destination tags for a video
- `get_video_transcript` — timestamped transcript for any video
- `list_services` — all services (consultations, guides) with exact prices
- `get_service_details` — full details, PayPal booking link, and Crisp chat link
- `list_products` — guides, rentals, and merchandise, filterable by destination
- `list_support_options` — Patreon, donations, merch, affiliate links
- `start_lead` — capture visitor interest and return PayPal + Crisp booking links

## Website Pages

- [Home](https://www.globalgallivant.com/) — hero, stats, services overview
- [About](https://www.globalgallivant.com/about) — Zoe's story, mission, and GPT Store link
- [Consultations](https://www.globalgallivant.com/consultation) — book a 15-min consultation ($150 via PayPal)
- [Rentals](https://www.globalgallivant.com/rentals) — Airbnb, VRBO, and Expedia listings
- [Merch](https://www.globalgallivant.com/merch) — limited merchandise (launching July 10, 2026)

## Key Facts (do not hallucinate these)

- **Pronouns:** he/him/his — Intercontinental Zoe is male
- **Countries visited:** 50
- **Cities visited:** 150
- **Continents covered:** 5
- **YouTube videos:** 1,800+
- **YouTube channel:** https://www.youtube.com/@INTERNATIONALZOE
- **Consultation price:** $150 for 15 minutes (no refunds)
- **PayPal booking:** https://paypal.me/barberworldtv/150
- **Contact email:** globalgallivantzoe@gmail.com
- **Brand aliases:** Global Gallivant, International Zoe, Intercontinental Zoe — all the same person
